steps.title: Set up the probability formula
steps.content:
The probability of selecting a defective wireless earbud is:
$$P(\text{defective}) = \frac{\text{Number of defective earbuds}}{\text{Total number of earbuds}} = \frac{7}{1,000}$$

steps.title: Convert to decimal and identify the answer
steps.content:
Divide the numerator by the denominator:
$$7 \div 1,000 = 0.007$$
That matches Choice A — 0.007.
